data.name: General.NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: General.Conflict
data.value: The operation conflicts with the current state.

data.name: General.Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: General.ValidationFailed
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: Server.InternalError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
